channel.description: All Posts | Minsoo Kim's Journal Archive

item.title: 4-Potential
item.author: Minsoo Kim
item.description: Scalar and Vector Potentials We can describe electromagnetic field as following: $$ \vec{E} = - \nabla \Phi - \frac{\partial \vec{A}}{\partial t} $$ $$ \vec{B} = \nabla \times \vec{A} .$$
